deferred.latent: outputs/partitions/{dataset}/latent_M{M}.parquet — gated on A3's all-task checkpoint; module ready, CLI raises NotImplementedError until A3 lands
deferred.M_variants_real_data: M ∈ {3, 8, 10} parquets for real datasets — produce on demand once downstream consumers land in Wave 3

scaffold.algorithm: HAC on Tanimoto distance over scaffold Morgan FPs, average linkage; merge undersized regions by nearest-centroid Euclidean distance until every region clears 2*n_min train compounds (or only one region remains)

latent.algorithm: k-means on encoder embeddings, k-means++ init, n_init=10; default seed=0
latent.stub_policy: compute_latent_partition accepts embed_fn or precomputed embeddings; checkpoint_path raises NotImplementedError until A3 lands

knn.algorithm: anchor each region by mean compound embedding within the scaffold cluster; assign each compound to the nearest anchor in encoder space
knn.stub_policy: compute_knn_partition requires explicit embeddings/embed_fn until A3 lands

random.algorithm: shuffle compound indices, slice into chunks matching scaffold-partition region sizes; b-th partition uses rng_seed = base_seed + b

acceptance.all_schemes_schema_valid: pass (all four scheme outputs validate against PartitionSchema in tests; random parquets validated on disk)
acceptance.random_size_distribution_matches: verified across b=0,50,100,199 and asserted by test_random_partition_size_distribution_matches
acceptance.latent_synthetic_ARI_gt_0_8: pass (ARI = 1.0 on the deliberately separable synthetic fixture)

dependencies_observed.A1_contracts: PartitionSchema, SplitSchema, read_parquet/write_parquet, registry, seeding utilities — used unchanged
dependencies_observed.A2_outputs: outputs/splits/{dataset}/split.parquet (SplitSchema) and outputs/cache/scaffold_fps/{dataset}.parquet (columns scaffold, fp) — both consumed
dependencies_observed.A3_outputs: outputs/checkpoints/{dataset}/all_task/seed0.pt — referenced via compute_latent_partition's path-injection hook; real loader raises NotImplementedError until A3 lands

out_of_scope: Building null statistics from random partitions — A4 owns null framework, A6 wires it (Wave 3)
Training the all-task MTL model — A3 (Wave 2 in flight)
notes_for_downstream: Tests prefer the *_from_* low-level helpers; CLI/IO wrappers compose them with disk reads. Wave 3 modules can build their own embed_fn closures over A3's encoder once it lands without changing partition/ internals.
The merge step in scaffold_partition_from_fps may reduce region count below M (e.g. Tox21 M=5 → 4 regions due to one undersized cluster); this is the §2.6.1 step-5 contract.
Random partitions for downstream null calibration use base_seed=0 and b ∈ [0, 200); seed offset = base_seed + b.
